title: EDIT Forecast, Price Target & Analyst Ratings
text: Editas Medicine (NASDAQ: EDIT) Analyst Ratings and Forecast. Analyst Consensus: Multiple analysts tracking Editas provide varying perspectives on investment merit. Consensus rating typically ranges from Neutral to Moderate Buy depending on analysis timing. Price Target Consensus: Compiled from multiple analysts showing average targets in $4-6 range. Some outlier targets exist on both high and low sides. Rating Breakdown: Strong Buy: Small percentage of coverage. Buy: Larger percentage reflecting optimism on clinical programs. Hold: Largest single category reflecting uncertainty. Sell: Smaller percentage with specific bear thesis. Analyst Commentary Themes: Positive Points: EDIT-401 represents significant opportunity. Differentiated CRISPR approach. Strong scientific leadership. Negative Points: Gene therapy market faces intense competition. Manufacturing challenges for cell therapy. Regulatory pathway uncertainties. Capital requirements remain high. Neutral Points: Cash runway tracking as expected. Execution appears on plan. Market conditions remain uncertain. Recommendation Evolution: Ratings have been subject to change as: New clinical data emerges. Partnership discussions progress. Market conditions evolve. Competitive landscape shifts. Investor Considerations: Biotech investors generally find EDIT presents risk/reward profile suitable for growth-oriented, risk-tolerant investors.
